query:
SELECT COUNT(*)
         FROM audit_log
         WHERE ($1::BIGINT IS NULL OR user_id = $1)
           AND ($2::TEXT IS NULL OR action = $2)
           AND ($3::TEXT IS NULL OR target_type = $3)
           AND ($4::TIMESTAMPTZ IS NULL OR created_at >= $4)
           AND ($5::TIMESTAMPTZ IS NULL OR created_at <= $5)
